productDisplayName: Fila Men Black Speed Lite Shoes
description: Style NoteThis fila shoe with its sleek upper and light weight makes for great Sports shoe that doubles as a stylish casual shoe.Product DetailsGrey and black sports shoe with mesh upper for lightweight comfort and absolute breathabilityStrategically placed synthetic overlays for added shoe structureCentral lace-up system for an abrasion-free, sung, customised FitMeshed and padded tongue and padded fabric collarPU midsole for lightweight comfort, fabric footbed for sweat-free wearOutsole reinforced onto the upper as a toe guard for enhanced forefoot protectionTPR outsole with waffle patterned lugs, Material and CareSynthetic, meshWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
